---
title: "DESeq2 Differential Expression Analysis — Airway Dry Run (GSE52778)"
author: "Sanket Shelke"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: show
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = TRUE, message = TRUE)
readRenviron(file.path("..", ".env"))
```

## Load libraries

```{r libraries}
library(DESeq2)
library(ggplot2)
library(pheatmap)
```

## Load count matrix and metadata

Reuses the objects produced by `scripts/import_counts.R` — count matrix
already column-reordered and key-matched against `sample_metadata.csv`.

```{r dependancies}
project_root <- Sys.getenv("PROJECT_ROOT")
source("../scripts/import_counts.R")
stopifnot(all(colnames(count_cols) == metadata$run_accession))
```

## Build DESeqDataSet

Design formula uses the metadata's existing column names (`cell_line`,
`condition`) rather than renaming metadata to match a formula shorthand.

```{r build-dds}
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
  countData = count_cols,
  colData   = metadata,
  design    = ~ cell_line + condition
)

dds
```
```{r}
dds$condition <- relevel(factor(dds$condition), ref = "untreated")
levels(dds$condition)
```
```{r}
dds <- DESeq(dds)
res <- results(dds)
summary(res)
```
```{r}
res["ENSG00000103196", ]
```
